cards.back: A set of proactive measures taken to protect cloud resources and data from unauthorized access, use, disclosure, disruption, modification, or destruction
A security approach that uses distributed systems and machine learning algorithms to detect and respond to intrusions and anomalies in real-time, across multiple cloud resources
The process of converting plaintext data into unreadable ciphertext to protect it from unauthorized access, while allowing authorized parties to decrypt and access the data
A security mechanism that defines the permissions and access rights of users, groups, or services to specific cloud resources, such as data, applications, or infrastructure
A security approach that uses machine learning algorithms to analyze user behavior and detect anomalies that may indicate malicious activity, such as unusual login times or locations
